---
title: "Interactive app"
toc: false
---

The tutorial app lets you climb every rung of the ladder on four datasets, and run
[causal discovery](workflow/01-causal-discovery.qmd) and
[simulation validation](workflow/04-validation.qmd) **live** — no torch, no server
round-trips to a model, just the frozen bundles plus in-browser computation.

::: {.callout-tip}
Deep links: append `?stage=1` (discovery) or `?stage=4` (validation) to jump
straight to a rung.
:::

<iframe
  src="https://andystats.shinyapps.io/causal-shap-ladder/"
  title="Causal SHAP tutorial app"
  style="width:100%; height:820px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:12px;"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>

If the frame does not load, open the app directly:
[andystats.shinyapps.io/causal-shap-ladder](https://andystats.shinyapps.io/causal-shap-ladder/).

## Run it locally

```bash
cd app
pip install -r requirements.txt
shiny run app.py
```

The deployed app ships **no torch and no gcastle** — discovery uses `causal-learn`
and validation uses a moment-matched multivariate-normal generator, both fast
enough to run in the browser session.
